subject: Summer Tech Carnival Upgrade Opportunity
body: Dear Siddharth, your cloud cluster is currently eligible for an immediate 30% performance scale up at no additional cost for the next 3 months. Click the link to review.

subject: Inquiry regarding custom visual reporting API integration
body: Hey there! We saw your Summer Tech announcement and wanted to know if your analytics widget allows white-labeling. Please get in touch.

subject: [Draft] Welcoming our new Enterprise Cohort Users
body: Hi {{name}}, welcome to the platform! We are thrilled to help you scale your operational databases. Reply if you need custom onboarding guidance.

subject: Scheduled: Next-Gen Dev Portal Launch
body: Hi everyone, tomorrow we are pushing our completely rebuilt developer playground with multi-language SDK runtimes.
